theme_archetype.rationale: The 3D immersive requirement, particularly the 'Applicants City' cyberpunk vibe and voxel aesthetic, demands a dark, technical, and gamified interface. Glass-morphic UI panels will sit atop the cinematic 3D canvas.

headings.usage: Hero titles, panel headers, city selection.

mono.usage: Data points, stats, commit-like counts, floors, code-like UI elements.

rules: Use strict tracking (-0.02em to -0.04em) on Unbounded for impact.
Data labels must be uppercase, tiny, wide-spaced (JetBrains Mono tracking-widest).

spacing_and_layout.canvas: The 3D canvas must cover 100vw and 100vh. position: fixed, z-index: 0.
spacing_and_layout.ui_layer: absolute inset-0 z-10 pointer-events-none. All interactive UI panels must have pointer-events-auto.
spacing_and_layout.panels: Use Shadcn Sheet or Card components positioned absolutely. Example: Job Details panel anchored to the right (w-full md:w-1/3 h-full).
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: For 'Compare Applicants', use a 2x2 CSS grid overlay (gap-6) over the 3D scene, slightly scaled down to see the city in the background.
spacing_and_layout.padding: Generous. p-8 or p-12 for inner panel content.

glassmorphism.usage: Apply to all floating UI panels, navbars, and stat cards.

buttons.primary: Solid vibrant color (Jobs: #FF5F6D, Apps: #00FFCC) with black text. Hover: saturate-150 and scale up 1.05.
buttons.secondary: Transparent glass with white 1px border. Hover: bg-white/10.

interactive_3d.hover: Change building color to bright white/emissive on hover.
interactive_3d.cursor: Use a custom cursor style when hovering interactive 3D buildings (e.g., crosshair or custom SVG pointer).

tech_stack_and_3d.optimization: CRITICAL: Use <InstancedMesh> for rendering hundreds of buildings in the voxel cities. Do not map over individual <mesh> components for every building, or performance will tank.
tech_stack_and_3d.camera: Use MapControls from Drei for isometric/city exploration, with smooth damping.

image_urls.description: Night aerial city view to serve as a loading screen or fallback hero for Applicants City.
Sunset city view to serve as a loading screen or fallback hero for Jobs City.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install dependencies: `yarn add @react-three/fiber @react-three/drei three framer-motion lucide-react`.
Set up two main route views: `/jobs-city` and `/applicants-city`.
The 3D Scene (`<Canvas>`) should be fixed at the root level, dynamically loading the Jobs or Applicants scene based on the route.
Use `<InstancedMesh>` for rendering buildings. The number of floors represents job count / application count (scale the Y axis and adjust Y position).
UI overlays must be built using Shadcn UI, customized with the glassmorphism utility classes provided in these guidelines.
Include `data-testid` on all interactive UI components.
In Jobs City, cluster buildings around specific coordinates to form a stylized USA map layout.
In Applicants City, layout buildings in a dark, abstract grid.
